مقارنة شاملة لكل نوع وميزانية: A Complete Comparison for Every Type & Budget
سعر المتر لكل نوع، مقارنة المتانة والمظه: Per-meter price for each type, a durability and appearance comparison, and when to choose parquet versus ceramic — from 22 years of experience finishing apartments and villas in Cairo
لماذا الاختيار بين الباركيه والسيراميك ل: Why is choosing between parquet and ceramic not just a matter of price?
أكثر سؤال يصلنا عند تشطيب أي شقة هو: \"أ: The most common question we get when finishing any apartment is: "Should I lay parquet or ceramic?" — and the answer isn't a single number. The difference isn't only in price, but in the nature of each room: moisture, foot traffic, the desired feel, and how well the floor withstands water.
في هذا الدليل جمعنا أسعار موردينا الفعلي: In this guide we've gathered our suppliers' actual prices during the first quarter of 2026, clarifying the essential differences between each type so you can make a decision based on real information rather than the market's conflicting guesses.
أسعار الباركيه في مصر 2026 — حسب النوع: Parquet prices in Egypt 2026 — by type
الأكثر انتشاراً وأرخص أنواع الباركيه. قا: The most common and cheapest type of parquet. Its base is high-density compressed fiberboard (HDF) covered with a decorative layer and a protective layer. Ideal for dry bedrooms and living rooms, but sensitive to water if it seeps through the joints.
* الأسعار للتوريد فقط — التركيب يضاف 40–: * Prices are for supply only — installation adds EGP 40–70/m².
النجم الصاعد في السوق المصري. قاعدته حجر: The rising star in the Egyptian market. Its base is stone plastic composite, 100% waterproof and stable with temperature changes — making it the most suitable for the Egyptian climate and for areas that may be exposed to moisture.
طبقة خشب طبيعي فوق قاعدة مستقرة: A layer of natural wood over a stable base
أرو/زان/بلوط — يُصنفر ويُعاد تشطيبه: Arrow/beech/oak — can be sanded and refinished
أسعار السيراميك في مصر 2026 — من الاقتصا: Ceramic prices in Egypt 2026 — from economy to luxury
السيراميك المصري من أقوى الصناعات المحلي: Egyptian ceramic is one of the strongest local industries — the factories of Fayoum and 10th of Ramadan produce export-quality goods. This means wide options at competitive prices for every budget.
مقارنة شاملة: باركيه vs سيراميك: A comprehensive comparison: parquet vs. ceramic
لصق على الأرضية + تسوية + وزر: Gluing to the floor + leveling + skirting
نصائح المهندسين لتوفير 20–30% من تكلفة ا: Engineers' tips to save 20–30% on flooring costs
باركيه في النوم والمعيشة، سيراميك في الم: Parquet in bedrooms and living rooms, ceramic in the kitchen, bathroom, and entrance. Don't lay expensive ceramic in a bedroom or parquet in a bathroom.
اختر SPC للمناخ المصري:: Choose SPC for the Egyptian climate:
الرطوبة وتغير الحرارة يفسدان اللامينيت ا: Moisture and temperature changes ruin cheap laminate. SPC is a little more expensive but lasts many times longer — a long-term saving.
اطلب كل السيراميك بأمر واحد لضمان تطابق: Order all the ceramic in a single purchase to ensure color matching and stronger negotiating power — the difference can reach 10–15%.
8% للباركيه (نقري بسيط)، 12–15% للسيرامي: 8% for parquet (simple click), 12–15% for ceramic depending on size and installation angle. Buying less than enough costs you a batch and color difference.
